description: You are a DevOps Engineer logged into Redmine as 'admin' (password: Admin1234!). Provision a service account for a new CI/CD pipeline. Enable the REST Web Service and create a user with the login 'ci_runner', name 'CI Bot', email 'ci_runner@example.com', and password 'PipelineRun88!' (ensuring the user is not required to change their password at next logon). Obtain the API access key for the 'ci_runner' account and save the exact key to /home/ga/ci_api_key.txt.
